nsw.description: The 2025 edition of Uganda National Science Week (UNSW) will be held under the theme 'Innovating for a Sustainable Future'. The week-long event will feature a series of activities including the National Science & Innovation Fair, Ministerial Science Policy Symposium, and various workshops and exhibitions across Kampala.

nsw.mainContent: Uganda National Science Week 2024 was held under the theme 'Harnessing Science and Technology for Socio-Economic Transformation'. The event attracted over 20,000 attendees from 47 districts across Uganda.

events.title: National Science & Innovation Fair
events.subtitle: Showcasing Uganda's brightest young innovators
events.mainContent: The flagship event of UNSW, bringing together student innovators from all 47 districts to present solutions to real-world problems.

events.title: Ministerial Science Policy Symposium
events.subtitle: High-level dialogue on Uganda's science agenda
events.mainContent: Bringing together ministers, technocrats, and research leaders to shape Uganda's national science and technology policy framework.
